subcodes.first_line: O spiritual leaf! Be not sorrowful or distressed at the ascension of that divine bird to the eternal gardens [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه روحانیه از صعود آن طیر آشیان الهی بحدائق باقیه مکدر مباش و متلهف مشو
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @soul; spirit after death, @realms of being; three realms; five realms, @eulogies; reminiscences
